data.name: NTR Phone
data.detailed_description:
NTR Phone

Overview

In this narrative - driven chat simulation, you will navigate a high-stakes web of romance and jealousy, where you must choose your replies carefully to protect your partners from being stolen by rivals.

Based on your choices stories and either end up in NETORARE or NETORASE or if you go for True love ending then thats possible too...

CHLOE:

Can your relationship survive her ambition?

You play the boyfriend. Chloe is the love of your life, but her demanding job and a flirtatious boss are testing your bond. As she climbs the corporate ladder, rivals are waiting to steal her away.

  • Make Tough Choices: How you react to her trips, texts, and photos changes the story.

  • Multiple Endings: One wrong choice could mean losing her forever.

LUNA:

Can you keep up with Luna?

Luna is the ultimate sporty girlfriend, but her job comes with a major hazard: a shop owner who wants her for himself. He’s always there, offering favors and attention when you aren't around.

  • Protect Your Relationship: Show her you're the better man before her boss convinces her otherwise.

  • Win or Lose: Choose wisely, or watch the shop owner steal her heart.

ASHLEY:

From Best Friend to Bride... or a stranger's wife?

You have a massive crush on your childhood friend, Ashley, but you aren't the only one. Rivals are making their moves, and they are moving fast. The pressure is on to transition from "friend" to "husband" before it’s too late.

  • The Ultimate Goal: Confess your feelings, win her over, and marry her.

  • The Nightmare Scenario: If you fail, you will have to watch her fall for another man and bear his children while you are left behind.





    wishlist now!

data.short_description: In this narrative - driven chat simulation, where you must choose your replies carefully to protect your partners from being stolen by rivals.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
